tasks.description: Verify that the new auto-merge authorization for NimuthuGanegoda does not bypass required status checks.
Audit the Calamares configuration to ensure no insecure defaults are introduced during the installer implementation.
Audit new GPU detection logic for potential command injection or unexpected behavior with unusual lspci output.
Audit network detection regex for potential injection or parsing vulnerabilities.
Ensure milestone logging in partitioning script cannot be manipulated via environment variables.
